title: eschscholzia minutiflora var. rutifolia
intro: Eschscholzia minutiflora var. rutifolia, also known as the Dwarf California Poppy or Desert Poppy, is a plant species within the poppy family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to improve sleep quality, reduce stress, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other pain-related conditions. Eschscholzia minutiflora var. rutifolia is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is considered safe for use when consumed in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
